measurement_method: embedded PostgreSQL pg_total_relation_size deltas, embedded JetStream file-store deltas, and committed served live-load resource counters

storage_measurements.measurement_source: pg_total_relation_size('certificates') after inserting representative certificate rows

storage_measurements.unit: sealed credential row with unique tenant index
storage_measurements.measurement_source: pg_total_relation_size('credentials') after inserting representative sealed credential rows

storage_measurements.unit: event envelope in embedded JetStream file store
storage_measurements.measurement_source: file-store byte delta after appending representative tenant lifecycle events with SyncAlways

storage_measurements.surface: audit projection over the event log
storage_measurements.measurement_source: json.Marshal(audit.Record) for a representative actor-attributed mutation

derived_capacity_tiers.name: single-node regulated evaluation
derived_capacity_tiers.notes: Bundled PostgreSQL/NATS for evaluation; move to external datastores before production multi-tenant use.

derived_capacity_tiers.name: external datastore production
derived_capacity_tiers.notes: External PostgreSQL and JetStream, two control-plane replicas, isolated signer process.

derived_capacity_tiers.name: multi-replica enterprise
derived_capacity_tiers.notes: External HA PostgreSQL, external JetStream cluster, isolated signer capacity scaled separately.

notes: Audit records are measured as event-log projections because trstctl does not maintain a separate audit table.
Cost rows are model outputs from measured storage/resource units plus visible base/headroom assumptions; customer SKU pricing is intentionally outside this artifact.
